supersede_note: Retained as a record, not deleted. Option C was withdrawn on 2026-07-22; the forward-accumulation retention rules are in workflow/tqe-p5-forward-accumulation.work-unit.draft.json.

raw_response_retention.storage_location: outputs/p5-option-c-capture/ (gitignored; never committed to the repository)

compression.reason: Trial capture shows one full-market MI_INDEX CSV is ~3.49 MB uncompressed; the S9 release-hardening audit caps artifacts at 2 MB, so raw CSVs are stored gzip-compressed (~0.69 MB observed).

size_limits.total_raw_retention_estimate_note: 750 sessions x ~0.7 MB gzip; exact total is recorded per session at capture time.
size_limits.fail_closed: stop the run if any single session exceeds per_session_csv_uncompressed_max_bytes

digest_record_format.recorded_digest: sha256 of the uncompressed CSV bytes, prefixed sha256:<hex>
digest_record_format.gzip_digest: sha256 of the stored .csv.gz file is also recorded for storage integrity
digest_record_format.per_session_record: session_date, url, retrieval_timestamp (+08:00), http_status, response_bytes (uncompressed), response_sha256, gzip_bytes, gzip_sha256, row_count_full_market_section, result
digest_record_format.aggregate_manifest: one JSON manifest per run listing every per-session record plus the calendar digest and work-unit digest, stored under outputs/ with the raw files

license_and_attribution.attribution: 資料來源：臺灣證券交易所
license_and_attribution.license_reference: https://data.gov.tw/license (政府資料開放授權條款-第1版)
license_and_attribution.note: Attribution is shown in the dashboard data-source panel and in every normalized fixture manifest.

normalized_fixture_admission.repo_admission_condition: Normalized fixtures enter the repository only after (1) this retention policy is approved, (2) the terms_of_use review for the MI_INDEX endpoint is recorded in the source contract, and (3) the exact per-session work-unit digest is approved by the user.
normalized_fixture_admission.normalized_format: compact JSON/CSV per session with source, retrieval time, period, and sha256 metadata, decoded from CP950 per the trial-capture encoding probe

retention_review.review_trigger: before the first capture run and at every P5.6 acceptance replay
retention_review.deletion_policy: caller may delete outputs/p5-option-c-capture/ at any time; the repository must function without it (raw responses are external evidence, not repository state)

required_approval: User approval of this policy is required_before_activation item fixture_retention_license_size_and_sha256_policy_approval_for_per_session_csv.
